posts.author: JayHayashi (Jay Lim)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m using the Increase/Decrease function in automation and I found out that I am unable to input a number, for example, 0.5 or 1.2.

It would help with my process if this could be implement. I am only able to return a whole number now which put a crutch into my process.
